notes: Refines Spending Plan beta so its top navigation matches the Pathmark Online dashboard style using a segmented control near the top of the page.
Reworks the Spending Plan Assessment home into dashboard-style cards for income, outflows and safe weekly spend.
Keeps detailed money-flow metrics below the main dashboard cards and preserves the current Spending Plan section after saves.
Keeps favicon/OAuth branding refinements from v0.6.35.
release: v0.6.36 Spending Plan dashboard navigation refinement
release_notes: Aligns the Spending Plan beta interface with the Pathmark Online dashboard by moving section navigation close to the top and making Assessment a calm money-flow dashboard.
label: Spending Plan dashboard navigation refinement
